LanguageData.ARA_Titan_Base_Technology.label: Titan Tentacle Specialization
LanguageData.ARA_Titan_Base_Technology.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

The research path to unlock the Arachne Swarm Titan Tentacles. 

This technology cannot be actively researched and will be unlocked by the type of Queen Arachne at the beginning.
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_8SLA.label: Node SLA-8 "Beast of Slaughter"
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_8SLA.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

Allows the queen species to hatch new beast bugs - the violent slaughter species. 

All technologies in the Titan Tentacles of the Arachne Swarm require blueprints, and their research can only be carried out through genetic test eggs.
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_7ACD_T.label: Node ACD-7 "Fat Dissolving Strong Acid"
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_7ACD_T.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

Allow honeypot species to undergo directed evolution, abandoning the ability to hatch auxiliary insects in exchange for a fat-dissolving strong acid that dissolves prisoners and captives in exchange for quick exchange for insect honey. 

All technologies in the Titan Tentacles of the Arachne Swarm require blueprints, and their research can only be carried out through genetic test eggs.
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_3LGN_T.label: Node LGN-3 "Might of the Legion"
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_3LGN_T.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

Allow the guard species to undergo directed evolution, abandoning the ability to hatch auxiliary insects in exchange for more powerful melee, long-range, defensive capabilities and various physical skills. 

All technologies in the Titan Tentacles of the Arachne Swarm require blueprints, and their research can only be carried out through genetic test eggs.
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_6LOD_T.label: Node LOD-6 "Lord of the Nest"
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_6LOD_T.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

Allow Sky Seeds to undergo directed evolution, sacrificing the ability to maneuver at high speeds and high altitudes in exchange for the ability to project a large number of Sky Nest Seeds at the enemy. This flying auxiliary insect is very fast and difficult to deal with in close combat. 

All technologies in the Titan Tentacles of the Arachne Swarm require blueprints, and their research can only be carried out through genetic test eggs.
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_7EVO_T.label: Node EVO-7 "Carapace Thorn"
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_7EVO_T.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

Allows the implementation of the new Arachne evolution surgery, which allows Arachne Zerg to implant spiny tubes that automatically attack nearby enemies. 

All technologies in the Titan Tentacles of the Arachne Swarm require blueprints, and their research can only be carried out through genetic test eggs.
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_1STG_T.label: Node STG-1 "Blooming Cavity"
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_1STG_T.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

Allows Arachne's cocoon to hatch new weapons.
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_3XPV_T.label: Node XPV-3 "Spearart"
LanguageData.ARA_Technology_3XPV_T.description:
Arachne Swarm-Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat. 

Allows Arachne's cocoon to hatch new weapons.
